description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs "yarn global add codecov" and then "yarn" to install dependencies. Define a single stage called test and add a test job in that stage that executes the command "yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN". The pipeline has no services, artifacts, or special rules, and it runs on every commit.
